title: Ghruom’s Vendetta
bodyText: Capt. Ghruom vowed to find Root's killer (S22–23). The party deflected the accusations with words — but Felson's shadow-stalker disguise, the fireball hole in the manor, and Eira's obliteration all left impressions. A patient fuse under everything the party built in Koviz (F & B, Brolin's sainthood).
